title: Proof Techniques, Invariants, and Recurrence Bounds · Proof Workshop
summary: Review a proposed optimization whose runtime and correctness claims lack evidence. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a formal algorithm review packet while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use induction on input size or recursive structure to prove algorithm properties.
State initialization, maintenance, and termination for nontrivial loop invariants.
Use contradiction and exchange arguments where direct construction is awkward.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
